reference: Hi, thank you for asking. Your daughter may have some genetic disorders. Long-term medical management may be required in such cases. The prognosis almost depends upon the future medical management. If everything goes uneventfully, then the patient can reach a normal life expectancy, but the chances of this are very minimal. Have a nice day.
text: Hi, thank you for asking. Your daughter may have some genetic disorders. Long-term medical management may be required in such cases. The prognosis almost depends upon the future medical management. If everything goes uneventfully, then the patient can reach a normal life expectancy, but the chances of this are very minimal. Have a nice day!
